Case MODerPriceBasis When '1'    Then MODerCostPiece * (1 + WksValue/100)

                          When '3'    Then WksValue

ELSE 0

Case When (RefType = 'J' And ISNULL(QtyOrderedConv, 0) <> 0)
THEN ((dbo.GetJobPlanFOvhdCost(RefNum,RefLineSuf)+dbo.GetJobPlanLbrCost(RefNum,RefLineSuf)+

        dbo.GetJobPlanVOvhdCost(RefNum,RefLineSuf))/QtyOrderedConv)
ELSE 0
END

CASE
WHEN dbo.MOGetBOMType(CoNum) = 'P' THEN
(SELECT TOP 1 jm.ratio1 FROM job JOIN jobitem jm ON jm.job = job.job AND jm.suffix = job.suffix AND jm.item = Item

ELSE
(SELECT jb.MO_qty_per_cycle FROM job jb where jb.job = RefNum AND jb.suffix = RefLineSuf)
END
